notes: Sustained iterative design session on AWB (Agent Workflow Builder) UI. 17 real prompts + 3 compaction summaries. Built Output Files panel, fixed FliHub resume flow (currentStepId, peekPendingIntake, off-by-one step advance), fixed UX highlight button, redesigned DataPanel (Table/Flat/Nested views), added parallel step cancel/timeout. Heavy Playwright MCP usage (38 browser interactions) as design verification loop. Voice-transcribed design critique throughout. Ralphy test campaign planned (wui-round21-tests, 5 work units, 4 waves). 49 Edits across WizardShell.jsx, StepRenderer.jsx, intake.js, LlmStep.jsx. Three context compactions — longest single session analysed so far. Commit and push at end-of-day (8h gap). No session naming.
